params.skillId: The skill to claim royalties for.

params.nodeId: The validator node to claim rewards for.

distributeValidatorReward(bytes32,bytes3.details: Called by ValidationRegistry or owner after validation is recorded.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

purchaseSkill(bytes32).details: Fee is split: 70% creator, 15% validator pool, 10% treasury, 5% burned.      Buyer must have approved the Marketplace for the skill price.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

checkAccess(address,bytes32).notice: Check if a user can access a skill (subscription + daily limit).

claimRoyalties(bytes32).notice: Claim accumulated royalties for a skill. Creator only.

claimValidatorRewards(bytes32).notice: Claim accumulated validator rewards for a node.

distributeValidatorReward(bytes32,bytes3.notice: Distribute validator pool for a skill to a specific validator.

purchaseCountOf(address).notice: Total number of skills purchased by each buyer.

purchaseSkill(bytes32).notice: Purchase a skill with TRUST tokens.

subscribe(uint8).notice: Subscribe to a tier. Payment in TRUST tokens for paid tiers.
